standing_authorization: BATCH-45-SPECIFIC, operator AskUserQuestion 2026-07-14 at kickoff. RUN MODE = 'Plan-approval gate' (verbatim option label + description: 'I present the spec/plan and stop for your approval before implementing; then drive to PR, stopping before merge'). INTERPRETATION: a SINGLE operator gate at the Phase-1 plan/spec — the agent runs Phase 0->1, PRESENTS the spec, and STOPS for operator approval before Phase 2/3. AFTER approval the agent runs Phases 2->6 AUTONOMOUSLY (review packets in-conversation at each gate, self-approving with a named exit-criteria axis check), through to 'PR opened + CI green'. MERGE = NOT GRANTED: stop there; the OPERATOR merges. Never self-merge. DECISION-RECORDING: every autonomous decision -> PLAN.md log + decisions_log + 05-postmortem + vault at sync. GUARDRAILS: engine-frozen set OFF-LIMITS (core.py/hexfile.py/range_index.py/validation/ /tui/a2l.py/tui/mac.py/tui/color_policy.py); entropy colours via a NEW band class map (do NOT edit color_policy.py) or frozen css_class_for_severity read-only; snapshot regen canonical-CI ONLY (LOCAL REGEN FORBIDDEN); C-27 frozen dual-guard each increment; requirement amendments on locked R-TUI-035/036/050/051 via §6.5 before/after (never silent edit). PER-BATCH RULE: batch-45-only; NEVER carried. Return to operator on: the Phase-1 plan-approval gate, PR-opened+CI-green (for merge), or a genuine operator-only decision. >>> UPDATE 2026-07-14 (operator: 'Approved, take it all the way to merge.'): PLAN APPROVED (Phase-1 gate) + MERGE AUTHORITY NOW GRANTED. Agent runs Phases 2->6 autonomously (review packets in-conversation at each gate, self-approving with a named axis check) through PR opened + CI green; then a FINAL independent PR-level qa-reviewer pass over the WHOLE merged diff vs main (dual traceability intact, 0 engine-frozen diffs, no cross-increment regression via C-26, every gate carry discharged) MUST come back clean; only then merge, then /dev-flow-sync. A HIGH final-QA finding BLOCKS the merge and returns to operator. Snapshot regen = canonical-CI follow-up PR post-merge.
